seo_coaching_desc: Track your training plans and send technical video feedback directly to your Coach.
seo_plan_desc: View detailed training plan designed by your personal coach.

coaching.title: ONLINE PT COACHING SYSTEM
coaching.subtitle: Workout program custom designed by your Coach
coaching.no_plans: You have not been assigned any workout plan yet

coaching.lock_prev_exercise: You must complete and submit video feedback for "{{name}}" before moving to the next exercise!
coaching.lock_current_exercise: You must complete and submit video feedback for "{{name}}" first!
coaching.all_completed_msg: Awesome! You have completed all technical videos. Please write your general feedback and click Submit Report below.
coaching.feedback_placeholder: Share your thoughts about today's session... (Fatigue, muscle soreness, questions...)
coaching.upload_feedback_video: Upload video to unlock next exercise
coaching.video_technical: Technical video execution for this exercise (Required)
coaching.upload_technical_hint: Click to select video of your movement (mp4, mov, avi...)
coaching.feelings_placeholder: How did this exercise feel? Any struggles or questions...

confirm_modal.title: Confirm report submission
confirm_modal.desc: Are you sure you want to submit this workout report to your Coach? If you need to make further edits, you can cancel to go back.

toasts.load_plan_err: Unable to load workout days list
toasts.duration_max_error: Feedback video must be maximum 20 seconds! Please select or trim another video.
toasts.duration_min_warning: Feedback video must be at least 15 seconds! Please record your movement in detail.
toasts.upload_failed: Failed to upload feedback video, please try again
toasts.remove_success: Removed feedback video for this exercise
toasts.remove_failed: Failed to remove feedback video, please try again
toasts.incomplete_warning: You must upload feedback videos for all exercises first! "{{name}}" does not have a video yet.
toasts.submit_success: Awesome! Workout report submitted successfully to Coach!
toasts.submit_failed: Failed to submit feedback, please try again
